## Remarks

Produced by [toStandardSchema](../../../../../../server/standard-schema-bridge/functions/toStandardSchema.md).  Passed as the `inputSchema`
option in `registerGetACoffeeTool` so the MCP SDK can
validate incoming tool calls at the protocol level.
